zh.lifeSummary: 當Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene於1661年8月10日出生在尼福 內德藍德時，她的父親Arian Jansz34歲，母親Annetje Duchene31歲。她於大約1680年與Anthony Tysen Swaim在美國紐約州里士滿里士滿結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1727年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼里士滿享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene于1661年8月10日出生在尼福 內德藍德时，她的父亲Arian Jansz34岁，母亲Annetje Duchene31岁。她于大约1680年与Anthony Tysen Swaim在美国纽约州里士滿里士滿结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1727年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼里士滿享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jansz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Dutch: relationship name, patronymic from the personal name Jan.

nameMeanings.name: DuChene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Jean-Charles, Philippe.
French (Duchêne): variant of Duchesne . See also Chene .

variants.name: Duchaine
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Jacques, Julien, Marcel, Normand.
French: variant of Duchêne (see Duchene ) or Duchesne and, in North America, also an altered form of the latter.

variants.name: Duchesne
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Jacques, Marcel, Normand, Aime, Aldege, Andre, Cecile, Laurier, Lucien, Michel, Rosaire.

French and Walloon: topographic name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, from Old French chesne ‘oak’ (see Chene ), or a habitational name for someone from Le Chesne, the name of several places in the northern part of France. This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium. Compare Duchaine , Duchene , and Dushane .
History: This surname is listed (in the form Du Chesne) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

historicEvents.description: After the English took over in the 1660s, the colony was renamed New York, after the Duke of York

Historical Boundaries 1683: Richmond, New York Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Richmond, New York, United States 1898: Borough of Richmond, New York, United States 1975: Borough of Staten Island, New York United States

en.lifeSummary: When Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene was born on 10 August 1661, in New Netherland, her father, Arian Jansz, was 34 and her mother, Annetje Duchene, was 31. She married Anthony Tysen Swaim about 1680, in Richmond, Richmond, New York, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1727, in Richmond, New York Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene est née le 10 août 1661, à Nieuw Nederland, son père, Arian Jansz, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Annetje Duchene, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Anthony Tysen Swaim environ 1680, à Richmond, Richmond, New York, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1727, à Richmond, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene am 10. August 1661 in Nieuw Nederland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arian Jansz 34 und ihre Mutter Annetje Duchene 31. Sie hat um 1680 in Richmond, Richmond, New York, Vereinigte Staaten Anthony Tysen Swaim geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1727 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Richmond, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene è nata il il 10 agosto 1661 nel Nieuw Nederland, sua padre, Arian Jansz, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Annetje Duchene, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Anthony Tysen Swaim circa 1680, nel Richmond, Richmond, New York, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1727, nel Richmond, New York Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuCheneが1661年8月10日にニーウウ ネダーランドで生まれた時，父Arian Janszは34歳，母Annetje Ducheneは31歳であった。約1680年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州リチモンドリチモンドでAnthony Tysen Swaimと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1727年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーリチモンドで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene(이)가 1661년 8월 10일 니우w 네델랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arian Jansz(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annetje Duchene(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1680년 미국 뉴욕 주 리ch몽 리ch몽에서 Anthony Tysen Swaim(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1727년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 리ch몽에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene nasceu em 10 de agosto de 1661, em Nieuw Nederland, seu pai, Arian Jansz, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Annetje Duchene, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Anthony Tysen Swaim aproximadamente 1680, em Richmond, Richmond, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1727, em Richmond, New York Colony, British Colonial America, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene родилась 10 августа 1661 г. в местности ниеув недирланд, её отцу по имени Arian Jansz было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Annetje Duchene, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anthony Tysen Swaim около 1680 г. в местности ричмонд, ричмонд, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1727 г. в местности ричмонд, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene nació el 10 de agosto de 1661, en Nieuw Nederland, su papá, Arian Jansz, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Annetje Duchene, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Anthony Tysen Swaim aproximadamente 1680, en Richmond, Richmond, Nueva York, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1727, en Richmond, New York Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 66 años.
